name: Distracting Decoy

spell.name: Distracting Decoy
spell.failure: The creature is off-guard until the start of your next turn.
spell.critical_failure: As failure, but the creature also takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attacks while it’s off-guard.

text: You conjure a colorful, fast-moving shape, such as a small bird or other animal that draws your target’s eye. They must attempt a Will save.
